caption: A blue and yellow flag, representing Ukraine, waves against a pale, overcast sky. The flag is attached to a black pole on the right side of the frame. Superimposed on the blue upper half of the flag is the text "Hero Ukraine" in a light-colored, italicized font. A small, red circular logo containing the number "13" appears in the upper right area of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the flag billows and ripples in the wind, shifting its folds and contours. The camera remains stationary, capturing the rhythmic movement of the fabric as it flutters against the backdrop of the sky. No people or other objects are visible in the scene.
